# ADR-015 — Learning loop architecture · summary

_Generated heuristically (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). For higher quality summaries, set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY._

- **Single global tier:** every project sees every other project's patterns. Noisy, hard to filter, pr
- **Single local tier:** patterns don't compound across projects. Solo dev with N projects has N siloe
- **Two tiers:** local captures fresh observations cheaply; global aggregates only patterns validated 
- 1 occurrence = anecdote
- 2 = coincidence

- **Full doc:** docs/architecture/ADR-015-learning-loop-architecture.md
